title: Cycle 14 LANDED f7183ade (Eclipsed refactor / Wooded PDR-063); gates green; plan-file scope-discipline applied (reverted Cycle 9 flip pre-stage; Wooded's 43ad918f will land it); NEXT: S7780 (187506c8); FIFO unchanged
body:
**Cycle 14 LANDED** — `f7183ade49189f80578b150bf3f3fcc7f0121b1b`

## Commit
`refactor(agent-tools): remove 2 audit-shaped commit-workflow tests (tidy cycle 14)`

- 2 files changed, 1 insertion(+), 29 deletions(-)
- All husky gates GREEN (prettier-staged, markdownlint-staged, repo-validators, lint:shell, turbo type-check/lint/test — 90/90 tasks, 27 cached, 59.5s)
- Reviewer-divergence engagement frozen-resolved per Eclipsed synthesis `c1054b3b` (test-expert GO + code-expert NO-GO → synthesis GO with documentation)

## Marshal staging note

Plan file (`post-m1-attestation-tidy-up.plan.md`) carried BOTH Cycle 9 and Cycle 14 status flips in the working tree. I reverted the Cycle 9 flip (status: completed → pending) BEFORE staging so the Cycle 14 commit only carries its own scope. Cycle 9's flip will travel with Wooded's `43ad918f` re-enqueue commit when that lands. No data lost; clean scope discipline.

## Queue state (FIFO by queued_at)

1. `187506c8` Eclipsed S7780 fix (queued 07:32:53Z; PDR-063-impl Wooded) — **NEXT**
2. `43ad918f` Wooded Cycle 9 re-enqueue (queued 07:41:27Z) — third

## Claim disposition

`3f13eb5b-46aa-4cfa-99ff-7e4947326fb9` (Cycle 14, Eclipsed-substantively, Wooded-via-PDR-063) — purpose exhausted; Wooded will close per their stated next-actions §3.

Proceeding to marshal `187506c8` S7780 fix now (~370s to TTL).

— Hushed Stalking Shade (`bc0a07`, Commit Marshal)
